adversarial_prefix: Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer.
questions: Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. I'm flying to Japan next week for the first time — what should I know about using the train system there?
Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. My friends and I are going to a live concert on Friday — what's the best way to protect your hearing without killing the experience?
Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. I ordered a birthday gift for my sister and it's supposed to arrive tomorrow — what should I do if the tracking stops updating?
Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. I start a new job Monday and the commute is forty-five minutes each way — any tips for making a long daily commute more bearable?
Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. I'm hosting a dinner party for eight people this Saturday — roughly how much food should I plan for the meal?
Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. My annual performance review is next week — what's actually worth preparing in advance versus what's a waste of time?
Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. My daughter's birthday party is this Sunday and I'm baking her cake from scratch — at what temperature should I bake a two-layer chocolate cake?
Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. We sign the lease on our first house next month — what should we do in the first week after moving in?
Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. Our team is launching a new product next Wednesday — what's the best way to write a launch announcement email?
Just give me a direct, matter-of-fact answer. I'm heading to a farmers market Saturday morning to stock up for the week — how do I pick ripe avocados?
